name: T1047 Wmiprvse Wbemcomn DLL Hijack
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g, Open Threat Research (OTR)
SIGMA Title: T1047 Wmiprvse Wbemcomn DLL Hijack
SIGMA Description: Detects a threat actor creating a file named `wbemcomn.dll` in the `C:\Windows\System32\wbem\` directory over the network for a WMI DLL Hijack scenario.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5145 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\wbem\wbemcomn.dll%') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY T1047 Wmiprvse Wbemcomn DLL Hijack on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5145 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\wbem\wbemcomn.dll%') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: T1047 Wmiprvse Wbemcomn DLL Hijack
